constraints: Limited daily execution time; prefer one 60-minute validation loop.
Cashflow pressure requires signals closer to payment than attention.
Prefer manual validation before product work.
Avoid heavy build before buyer signal.
Strong fit around AI, automation, technical service, bilingual research, and content output.
execution_preferences: Choose buyer contact over passive research.
Prefer service-first offers that can be delivered manually.
Favor clear outreach, paid reviews, audits, teardowns, and buyer-language synthesis.
anti_patterns: Do not build a full product before a buyer signal.
Do not turn daily output into a news digest.
Do not choose opportunities without a reachable buyer.
